lines.text: Tell me what you're willing to do / Say you ride for me like I'm ride or die for you
All the times we've been through / I know it's hard for me to tell you how I feel
Girl, I'm so hurt / Girl, I'm tired of the arguments
Know we got the love, they just got too much pride
And if you could just forgive me / All I wanna do is right my wrongs
Right my wrongs / All I wanna do is right my wrongs
Oh, my mama told me, boy, you can't save 'em / You can't save 'em, oh my
And for that reason I told her that I'd never love again / After her, I'd never love again, oh my
Then you came along and you made a fool of me / And I tried so hard to guard my energy
But you still set fire to my trees, oh my / So now I'm out here beggin' you to love me again
And even though I know your love ain't free / All I wanna do is right my wrongs
Oh I, I know I was wrong, wrong / Right my wrongs, right my wrongs
